{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Reaper's slash
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Reaper's slash]] is a technique that [[Yerin]] imitated.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
